source: Manual boundary overrides for active 2026 hunts whose DWR hunt-table rows do not expose boundary IDs but whose unit geometry is available in the Utah DWR boundary layer.

records.source_note: LO0010 is Diamond Mtn Landowner Association. The DWR hunt-boundary matrix lists the LOA hunt row with no exposed boundary IDs. LOA workbook rows tie Diamond Mountain LOA to BoundaryID 206, and the render geometry is extracted from Utah_Landowner_Association_(LOA)_Boundaries.shp.
